reply:
(1) This is a Square D Motor Control Center Panel MCC-003. It's used to control and protect motors in industrial setting.

(2) The burnt smell suggests a short circuit or overcurrent. The lightning strike nearby could have caused a surge, leading to this issue.

(3) The tech should immediately check the circuit breakers and fuses for any blown components. If the smell persists, open the panel to inspect for any visible damage or overheating.
